quoteFirst: The custom was that the Prince, on the eve of his enthroning, should watch for two hours alone in the chapel of the castle, from
quoteLast: , and should there consecrate himself to God; the guests of the evening were departed; and a few minutes before eleven the Duke sate with the Prince in a little room off the chapel, waiting till it was time for the Prince to enter the building.
